title: JOREST 30Pcs Mini Car Fuse Kit - Mini Blade Fuses Automotive - Replacement Fuses Assortment Kit for Car/RV/Truck/Motorcycle(2Amp 3A 5A 7.5A 10A 15A 20A 25A 30A 35A 40A)
features: 【High cost-effective fuse kit】-- The kit includes 30pcs mini size fuses. The car fuses have 11 current specifications (2A /3A / 5A/ 7.5A/ 10A/ 15A/ 20A/ 25A/ 30A/ 35A/40A).

【Reasonable quantity matching】-- According to market research data, we have increased the number of fuses with commonly used current specifications of 10A/ 15A/ 20A, and reduced the number of other less-used fuses. The number is reasonable and and the use time of fuses is extended.

【High quality, easy to identify】-- The fuse is made of environmentally friendly plastic and zinc alloy. The fuse of each current specification is distinguished by different colors, and the current specification number is marked on the top of each fuse, which is easy to identify.

【Precise protection】-- According to many experimental data, the car fuses we designed can quickly melt itself when the electrical appliance reaches the rated current, and accurately protect operation of the electrical appliance.

【Installation Instructions】-- The kit contains fuse installation instruction to help you replace and install the fuse correctly. It is recommended that you compare the original car fuse with our fuse size or search the car fuse model on the Internet to choose the fuse suitable for your car model.
